summary: Stay page improvements testing completed. All features verified working: ConversationalEntry goal cards create service requests via API, updated text shows 'Tap a goal to request concierge assistance', Stay Concierge Experience cards display in 2x2 grid on mobile, ElevenLabs TTS endpoint with Elise voice working.

conversational_entry_goal_cards.details: Goal cards on Stay page create service requests via POST /api/concierge/pillar-request
verified: Clicking 'Vacation getaway' creates service ticket with toast notification
API returns success with ticket_id (TKT-*) and request_id (GOAL-*)
All 6 stay goals tested: vacation, boarding, staycation, business, weekend, multi_pet

conversational_entry_text.details: Text updated from 'chatting with Mira' to 'Tap a goal to request concierge assistance'

quickwintip_checklist_popup.details: Checklist popup implemented in StayPage.jsx lines 2726-2845
quickwintip_checklist_popup.notes: Popup opens when tip with actionType='checklist' is clicked. Tips are randomly selected so not all tips trigger popup.

stay_concierge_experience_cards.details: 4 experience cards display in 2x2 grid on mobile (390x844)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stay page improvements verified: ConversationalEntry goal cards create service requests (not open Mira AI), text updated to 'Tap a goal to request concierge assistance', QuickWinTip checklist popup implemented, Stay Concierge Experience cards in 2x2 grid on mobile, ElevenLabs TTS with Elise voice working. All backend tests pass.
